interface.longDescription: Map repository structure, dependencies, risks, dead code, and onboarding context without mutation. Migrated workflows: $repo-dependency-map, $repo-find-dead-code, $repo-map, $repo-onboarding, $repo-risk-map. This Codex-native edition packages explicit workflows as skills, records sensitive actions as explicit-only, and uses portable installed-skill paths.
